name: Xbox
description: Microsoft's first home console platform, known for Xbox Live, Halo, PC-style architecture, and early western console online gaming.

eras.title: Foundation Era
eras.description: Microsoft establishes Xbox through Halo, PC-style hardware, western RPGs, and early online console identity.

eras.title: Live Era
eras.description: Xbox Live, Halo 2, and online multiplayer define the platform's strongest identity.
